meta.title: DzTesters
meta.description: Human-powered software testing campaigns with layered review workflows.

home.title: DzTesters helps clients run structured crowdtesting campaigns with real people.
home.subtitle: Launch campaigns, match eligible testers, moderate incoming defects, and deliver final validated bug reports from a single platform.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to ship with confidence
featuresSection.subtitle: From campaign setup to validated defect delivery—one cohesive workflow for clients, testers, and review teams.

cta.title: Ready to run your next testing campaign?
cta.subtitle: Join DzTesters and connect with verified testers who deliver structured, review-ready bug reports.

home.coverageDescription: Confidence comes from structured campaigns, eligible testers, and review workflows—not guesses.
home.coverageP1: We connect you with real people who test your website or app in everyday situations, uncovering bugs and sharing honest feedback.
home.coverageP2: With their insights, you can refine your product and launch with confidence.

features.reviewDescription: Every bug passes through moderators and a test manager before it reaches the client dashboard.
features.rutDescription: Get feedback from a diverse group of real users who test your product in real-world scenarios.
features.matchingDescription: Campaign invitations are filtered by country, devices, OS versions, browsers, and tester type.

about.title: A practical crowdtesting platform for structured delivery.
about.intro: DzTesters was designed for teams that need human feedback without a heavy enterprise stack. Clients define campaign scope, testers work through targeted tasks, moderators maintain quality, and test managers deliver validated findings.
about.supportsBody: Multi-role access control, pricing preview, tester-device profiling, invitation-based matching, moderated bug review, analytics, and direct filesystem uploads for screenshots, videos, and logs.
about.architectureBody: Everything runs inside Next.js App Router with MySQL-compatible storage through Prisma and standard Node.js route handlers, which keeps deployment friendly to shared and VPS-style environments.

howItWorks.title: From campaign setup to validated defect delivery.
steps: Client creates a campaign and previews the estimated cost before launch.
DzTesters assigns a test manager and calculates moderator needs based on tester counts.
Eligible crowd testers and developer testers receive invitations based on country and device fit.
Testers work through tasks and submit structured bugs with attachments and environment data.
Moderators review duplicates and quality, then the test manager validates final reports for the client.

login.title: Login to continue a campaign or review queue.
login.subtitle: Clients, testers, moderators, test managers, and admins all use the same secure entry point with JWT session cookies and role-based dashboards.
login.cardDescription: Enter the email and password for your workspace role.
login.pendingApprovalAfterVetting: Vetting submitted successfully. Sign in again after an administrator activates your account.

signup.title: Join DzTesters as a client or tester.
signup.subtitle: Clients can launch campaigns and view validated defects. Testers can maintain device inventories, accept matched invitations, and submit detailed reports with evidence.
signup.note: Moderator and test manager roles are intended to be assigned by admins after account approval.
signup.cardDescription: Pick a role and complete the fields below.

client.title: Client workspace
client.description: Create campaigns, track tester participation, and review validated issues from a single dashboard.

tester.title: Tester workspace
tester.description: Manage your profile, accept invitations, and submit structured bug reports with evidence.

moderator.title: Moderator desk
moderator.description: Review incoming bugs, manage duplicates, and keep report quality high across campaigns.

manager.title: Test manager workspace
manager.description: Coordinate campaigns, validate findings, and publish final client-ready reports.

admin.title: Admin control
admin.description: Manage accounts, platform assignments, campaign oversight, and system configuration.

footer.tagline: DzTesters is a crowdtesting platform for structured human QA campaigns.

users.title: Account management
users.description: Approve or suspend accounts and elevate users into moderator or test manager roles.
users.awaitingVetting: Vetting not completed — manual approval available

invitations.title: Available campaigns
invitations.description: Matching invitations stay visible until required tester slots are filled.
invitations.emptyHint: Check back later or update your profile for better matches

workspace.title: Accepted campaigns
workspace.description: Open your workspace for tasks, instructions, and bug submission.
workspace.empty: You have not accepted any campaigns yet
